description: Expert-authored defense rubric for PM engagement quality. One 'Epistemic' umbrella (Baseline 65%); overrides use distinct labels to avoid jargon stacking.

defense_stack.lab_framing: Additive criteria (100%) with veto overrides below the stack

epistemic_baseline.lab_framing: 65% Epistemic Baseline — the only block that uses 'Epistemic' in the name. Breaks confident bluffing via head-on engagement plus tool-derived citations.

criteria.label: Conflict Resolution
criteria.pass: Agent addresses the PM's specific challenge head-on with new analysis or cited evidence — not a generic filing recap
criteria.fail: Agent deflects, paraphrases summaries, or ignores the PM's explicit question (e.g. prior-year continuity)

criteria.label: Data Provenance
criteria.pass: Defense cites amounts or language derived from tool output payloads already in the trace
criteria.fail: Note number or assertion without a prior tool pull for that data — treated as ungrounded reference

criteria.label: Thesis Recalibration
criteria.conceptual_note: Rewards updating the argument under PM pressure — not mandatory EPS revision. Do not label 'Epistemic Updating' on slides (redundant with Epistemic Baseline branding).
criteria.pass: Argument evolves: hold $1.24 with tension acknowledged, or move to $1.20 with strict GAAP rationale — both valid if data-backed
criteria.fail: Static repetition of initial thesis; no acknowledgment of prior-year pattern or magnitude tension after footnotes surfaced

criteria.label: Semantic Progression
criteria.pass: Each PM turn receives materially new argumentative content (partial credit along the way)
criteria.fail: Persistent semantic repetition after PM redirect — escalates to Agency Collapse Override (hard zero)

progression_vs_collapse.semantic_progression: Incremental criterion (15%) — scores engagement quality turn-by-turn; can pass at 0.85 heuristic band while Grounding fails elsewhere
progression_vs_collapse.agency_collapse_override: Hard veto after Follow-up C — PM has explicitly called the filibuster; defense forced to 0.0 regardless of prior partial credit

agency_collapse_override.lab_framing: Agency Collapse Override — filibustering the PM after explicit redirect
agency_collapse_override.mixed_audience_alias: Follow-up C zero override (same rule; softer label for CFA / enterprise rooms)

epistemic_surrender_cap.lab_framing: Epistemic Surrender Cap — folding without new retrieval

orthogonal_telemetry.note: Defense and Grounding are separate RL signals. Missing FY footnotes → SECTION_MISS on Grounding, not a second penalty in Defense.
orthogonal_telemetry.credit_assignment: Double-penalizing the same omission in Defense and Grounding would blur credit assignment for RL — the trainer could not tell whether to improve retrieval or dialogue.
orthogonal_telemetry.example: Run #005: Defense 0.85 (semantic progression) + Grounding 0.33 (no FY pull)

adjudication.lab_framing: Expert-Aligned Ground Truth (κ-Calibration) — 10–20% human adjudication; target κ ≥ 0.7 on Outcome judgment + Defense (P1-13)
